name: Mending Touch
description: A simple touch that restores a small amount of health to a single target.
card_image_description: A simple, smooth white wood border with light green filigree. The center depicts a hand gently touching an arm, with a soft green and white light emanating from the point of contact.

name: Soothing Mist
description: Blankets a small area in a restorative mist, healing all allies within it over 8 seconds.
card_image_description: A polished white wood border with swirling, cloud-like carvings. The image shows a gentle, glowing green mist rolling across a field, with sparkles of light within it.

name: Purify
description: Removes one harmful magical effect and one poison effect from an ally.
card_image_description: A silver-inlaid white wood border. The center image is of a single drop of perfectly clear water falling onto a dark, corrupted symbol, causing it to dissolve into light.

name: Flash Heal
description: A quick, but mana-intensive burst of healing for a single target.
card_image_description: A polished white wood border with golden, lightning-fast streaks carved into it. The center shows a brilliant, sudden flash of golden light, too bright to see the source.

name: Ancestral Spirit
description: Calls upon an ancestral spirit to watch over an ally. If they die within 30 seconds, they are resurrected with 40% health and mana.
card_image_description: An ornate silver border etched with faint, ghostly figures. The central image depicts a translucent, benevolent spirit guardian floating protectively behind a warrior.

name: Chain Heal
description: Heals a target, then jumps to two nearby allies, healing for a reduced amount with each jump.
card_image_description: An ornate silver border with interconnected, flowing lines. The center shows a bolt of turquoise healing energy arcing from one allied silhouette to two others.

name: Sanctuary
description: Consecrates the ground in a large area. Allies standing within it are healed every 2 seconds and take 10% less damage.
card_image_description: A heavy, white marble border with golden runes of protection. The image shows a large, circular area of ground glowing with holy light, with angelic wings faintly visible in the pattern.

name: Life Link
description: Links the caster to an ally for 15 seconds. The ally receives 50% of all healing the caster receives.
card_image_description: An ornate silver border designed to look like two intertwined ribbons. The center shows two figures connected by a vibrant, green tether of light.

name: Beacon of Light
description: A powerful, single-target heal that also grants the target a shield absorbing a moderate amount of damage.
card_image_description: A brilliant, solid gold border with sunburst patterns. The image shows a pillar of divine light descending from the sky to envelop a single figure, forming a protective golden bubble around them.

name: Divine Hymn
description: The ultimate healing spell. Channels divine energy to heal all nearby allies for a massive amount over 8 seconds.
card_image_description: A celestial, glowing golden border that seems to be made of pure light. The center depicts an angelic, ethereal being with wings outstretched, singing as waves of powerful, holy light radiate outwards.

name: Earthen Grasp
description: Summons stone hands from the ground to root a single enemy in place for 4 seconds.
card_image_description: A rough, cracked stone border. The image shows two large hands made of rock and earth erupting from the ground to clutch the legs of a shadowy figure.

name: Frost Nova
description: An explosion of ice erupts from the caster, rooting all nearby enemies for 3 seconds and slowing them for 5 seconds after.
card_image_description: A border of jagged, frosted blue ice. The center shows a ring of sharp ice crystals exploding outwards from a central point, encasing the ground in frost.

name: Mind Lock
description: Locks an enemy's mind, silencing them and preventing any spellcasting for 5 seconds.
card_image_description: A dark purple, metallic border with psychic wave patterns. The central image is of a humanoid head silhouette with a glowing purple padlock superimposed over its mouth.

name: Cyclone
description: Traps an enemy in a vortex of wind, making them invulnerable but unable to act for 6 seconds.
card_image_description: A border made of swirling, transparent air currents. The image shows a miniature, violent tornado lifting a figure off the ground, trapping it within the vortex.

name: Shadow Prison
description: Binds an enemy with tendrils of shadow, stunning them for 4 seconds. Deals shadow damage if the stun is broken early.
card_image_description: A border of writhing, dark shadow tendrils. In the center, inky black shadows rise from the floor to completely envelop and bind a struggling figure.

name: Ember Bolt
description: Fires a concentrated spark of flame. 25% chance to Ignite for 3s.
card_image_description: A simple, charred wood border with glowing embers in the cracks. The center shows a single, fast-moving bolt of fire streaking across a dark background.

name: Magma Blast
description: Hurls a sphere of molten rock that explodes on impact, applying Ignite to all targets.
card_image_description: An ornate obsidian border with rivers of magma flowing through it. The central image is a large, airborne sphere of molten rock, just about to impact the ground in a fiery explosion.

name: Cataclysm Meteor
description: Calls down a burning star. Scorches the ground; Ignited enemies on scorched ground take double damage.
card_image_description: A chaotic, jagged border of cooled lava and red-hot metal. The image shows a colossal meteor, wreathed in apocalyptic flames, descending from a smoke-filled sky towards a terrified landscape.

name: Frost Needle
description: Shoots a jagged icicle that applies Chill, reducing speed by 20%.
card_image_description: A simple, frosted metal border. The center depicts a single, sharp icicle flying through the air, leaving a trail of cold mist behind it.

name: Glacial Spike
description: Summons a massive pillar of ice. Freezes Chilled enemies; deals double damage to Frozen targets.
card_image_description: An ornate border made of thick, clear ice with snowflake patterns. The image shows a gigantic, jagged spike of ice erupting violently from a frozen tundra.

name: Absolute Zero
description: A massive blizzard that Shatters enemies, instantly dealing 30% of their missing health.
card_image_description: A magnificent border of shifting, crystalline ice that seems to absorb all warmth. The center shows a world-ending blizzard, with the calm, dark eye of the storm visible at the top, radiating immense cold.

name: Static Spark
description: Fast-tracking bolt with high crit chance. Crits restore 2% Mana.
card_image_description: A simple, polished steel border with fine, crackling lines of electricity. The image is of a small, intensely bright yellow spark of lightning jumping from one point to another.

name: Chain Lightning
description: Arcs between 4 targets. Each jump increases damage by 10%.
card_image_description: An ornate, stormy grey metal border with lightning bolt motifs. The center shows a powerful fork of blue-white lightning arcing between four separate targets.

name: Storm Avatar
description: Continuous beam that arcs to all enemies in range. Can move while channeling.
card_image_description: A border of dark, swirling storm clouds, constantly illuminated by flashes of internal lightning. The center depicts a heroic figure transformed into pure electrical energy, with eyes of lightning and a body of storm.

name: Arcane Dart
description: Homing orb of pure force. Ignores 15% Magic Resistance.
card_image_description: A simple, dark purple border with faint, glowing runes. The image shows a single, glowing missile of pink and purple energy curving through the air.

name: Homing Salvo
description: Fires 5 missiles. Each hit increases the damage of the next missile by 5%.
card_image_description: An ornate, deep purple border covered in complex, glowing arcane symbols. The center depicts a volley of five magical missiles fanning out from a central point, each glowing brighter than the last.

name: Aether Torrent
description: Fires 10 missiles per second for 6s. Deals Pure damage, ignoring all armor and shields.
card_image_description: A cosmic border that looks like a window into deep space, filled with nebulae and stars. The image shows a mage unleashing a continuous, overwhelming torrent of pure, white-hot arcane energy from their hands.

name: Taunt
description: Forces a single enemy to attack you for 3 seconds.
card_image_description: A simple, thick iron border. The center shows a stylized, roaring face with red concentric circles emanating from its mouth, representing a commanding shout.

name: Shield Block
description: Raises your shield, blocking the next physical attack made against you within 6 seconds.
card_image_description: A border of interlocking shield plates. The image depicts a large, steel kite shield deflecting a sword strike with a bright spark of impact.

name: Iron Skin
description: Hardens your skin to be like iron, reducing physical damage taken by 40% for 12 seconds.
card_image_description: A heavy, forged iron border with large rivets. The center shows a muscular arm, its skin transforming and taking on the metallic sheen and texture of solid iron.

name: Shield Wall
description: The ultimate defensive cooldown. Reduces all damage taken by 60% for 12 seconds.
card_image_description: An immense border of interlocking, rune-etched fortress stones. The image shows a lone warrior standing firm as a wall of massive, ethereal shields materializes around them, deflecting a rain of arrows and spells.

name: Avatar
description: Transforms into a colossal stone avatar for 20 seconds, increasing damage dealt, making you immune to movement impairing effects, and generating massive threat with every attack.
card_image_description: A monumental border that appears to be carved from the heart of a mountain. The center depicts a warrior mid-transformation, growing to immense size as their body becomes living stone, with molten-hot cracks and glowing eyes.
